summary: The actual screenshot partially matches the wireframe in terms of overall structure and style, including dark starfield background and panel layout, but shows significant deviations in content, controls, and visual details. The wireframe itself is not a precise visual baseline, reducing its suitability for detailed validation.

correctElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: Dark starfield/game-map background
correctElements.evidence: Both actual and wireframe feature a dark starfield background with stars and subtle gradients.

correctElements.requirement: Screen description: Game lobby browser with title
correctElements.evidence: Both display 'Game Lobbies' as the primary title in green terminal-style text.

correctElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: thin green panel borders
correctElements.evidence: Actual has thin borders around panels, matching the wireframe's green border style, though color appears slightly off due to rendering.

correctElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: semi-transparent black panels
correctElements.evidence: Panels in actual are semi-transparent black, overlaying the background similarly to the wireframe.

incorrectElements.requirement: Screen description: lobby list table occupying most of the center
incorrectElements.expected: A table or list occupying most of the center with multiple lobby entries, as described in wireframe text.
incorrectElements.actual: A single lobby entry is shown with host, mode, map, and player count, but the list does not occupy most of the center; large empty space below.
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: The list is not fully implemented or populated, leading to incomplete occupancy of the central area and missing multi-entry representation.

incorrectElements.requirement: Screen description: Create Lobby, Join Lobby, Refresh actions
incorrectElements.expected: Buttons for Create Lobby, Join Lobby, Refresh at the bottom or appropriate location.
incorrectElements.actual: No clear Create, Join, or Refresh buttons; only a '2/4' indicator and no bottom buttons matching wireframe's 'CREATE / CONTINUE' and 'BACK / CANCEL'.
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Missing key interactive controls, which are essential for user actions in the lobby browser.

incorrectElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: terminal-style labels
incorrectElements.expected: App-level header like 'RiskyStars Fleet command interface' at the top.
incorrectElements.actual: No app header; starts directly with 'Game Lobbies' and subtitle.
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Mismatch in overall screen structure, omitting global header present in wireframe.

incorrectElements.requirement: FR-UI-SCREEN-LOBBY-BROWSER: Visually satisfy the documented screen description
incorrectElements.expected: Concise subtitle or no large descriptive block; wireframe has descriptive text as placeholder.
incorrectElements.actual: Has subtitle 'Review active multiplayer sessions and join a command room', but wireframe has a large block of prompt text instead of UI elements.
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Actual has appropriate subtitle, but wireframe uses raw prompt text, leading to content mismatch.

incorrectElements.expected: Table with columns for host, mode, map, etc., as implied.
incorrectElements.actual: Shows 'Available Lobbies: 1' and 'Showing 1 active multiplayer sessions.', with one row, but no full table structure or headers.
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Lacks proper table formatting, headers, or multi-row support visualization.

incorrectElements.expected: Exact 1536x832 resolution with no scaling issues.
incorrectElements.actual: Appears to match resolution, but potential DPI or scaling differences in rendering of borders and text sharpness.
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Subtle differences in element sharpness and positioning suggest possible scaling or rendering variations between actual HWND and wireframe PNG.

wireframeSuitability.why: The wireframe provides a basic framed structure and style guidelines but primarily consists of textual description rather than a precise visual layout of UI elements like the lobby table and buttons, making it inadequate for detailed pixel-level or functional validation against requirements.
missingRequirements: Detailed depiction of lobby list table structure, including sample rows and columns (FR-UI-SCREEN-LOBBY-BROWSER)
Explicit placement and styling of action buttons (Create, Join, Refresh) (Screen description)
Validation of dynamic elements like player counts or status indicators (FR-UI-WIREFRAME-SUITABILITY-001)
recommendedWireframeChanges: Replace textual description block with actual wireframe elements: a sample lobby table with headers and rows.
Add precise rectangles for buttons with labels like 'Create Lobby', 'Join Lobby', 'Refresh'.
Ensure wireframe uses simple rectangles for controls and fixed geometry to match global style requirements.
